title: CrapBaseline
description: Committed baseline envelope for the CRAP (c^2 * (1 - cov)^3 + c) gate. Rows are deterministically ordered by (file, startLine, method). Kernel and escomplex versions pin the scoring environment so consumers detect silent drift.

$schema.description: Optional pointer back to this schema for editor tooling.

kernelVersion.description: Version of the in-repo CRAP scoring kernel. Bumped when the formula or scan shape changes. From 1.1.0 onward, a mismatch against the running kernel emits a warning and the gate continues — consumers refresh on their own cadence.

escomplexVersion.description: Version of the typhonjs-escomplex dependency used to produce this baseline. A mismatch against the installed dependency fails the gate closed (different kernel semantics are not negotiable).

tsTranspilerVersion.description: Version of the `typescript` package used to strip TS/TSX sources before scoring. Optional for envelopes produced by kernel 1.0.0; required for 1.1.0+. A mismatch against the running typescript dependency emits a warning and the gate continues.

rows.description: Per-method CRAP scores, sorted by (file, startLine, method).

file.description: Repo-relative POSIX path of the source file.

method.description: escomplex method name. Anonymous functions surface as '<anonymous>'.

startLine.description: 1-based escomplex lineStart used for drift-tolerant matching.
